caption:
The lecture hall air hummed with anticipation, or at least it did when I leaned back in my chair, adjusting the fabric of my skirt. My students were staring, eyes wide as the professor of the month, let's just say, made her entrance. I was Elena, and I wasn't just here to teach. I was here to set the mood. My blouse was crisp white, tailored to perfection, but my skirt? A daring choice. It hugged my hips in all the right places, the hemline just shy of hinting at the curves I spent hours perfecting. The fabric whispered secrets with every movement. I could feel the heat radiating from the podium, a familiar companion. The assignment I was about to discuss wasn't on the board; it was under my skirt. Or at least, it seemed so. The class was silent. Then, a blush spread from my cheeks down to my chest, hidden under layers of lace and silk. My heart beat to a rhythm they could almost hear. I smiled, a dangerous, knowing smile, and began to teach them exactly what they wanted to know. The notes I handed out were just the beginning. 🔥

#TeacherSecrets #UniversityVibes #ElenaStyle #ClassroomTension #SeductionUnderTheRaffs
